query:
SELECT 
  orders.deliveryPersonId,
  users.name as deliveryPersonName,
  users.username as deliveryPersonUsername,
  COUNT(*) as totalOrders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deliveredOrders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as returnedOrders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'postponed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as postponedOrders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelledOrders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'delivered' THEN orders.price ELSE 0 END) as totalRevenue
FROM orders
INNER JOIN users ON orders.deliveryPersonId = users.id
WHERE orders.deliveryPersonId IS NOT NULL AND users.role = 'delivery'
GROUP BY orders.deliveryPersonId, users.name, users.username
LIMIT 5
